artifacts.summary: Official Cairo University sources include a responsible AI policy PDF, an Arabic university news announcement of Cairo University's AI strategy, the 2025-2030 strategic plan PDF, and a Faculty of Pharmacy AI Unit page. Claims are scoped to these sources; external national-charter, robots-disallowed conference, and news/interview-like results were rejected.

فى اجتماع مجلس جامعة القاهرة : د. محمد سامي عبد الصادق يعلن إطلاق استراتيجية جامعة القاهرة للذكاء الاصطناعي

artifacts.claimText: Cairo University's 2025 responsible AI policy states objectives to raise awareness of AI applications, protect data confidentiality and security, and ensure responsible use that upholds academic values.

citation.citationTitle: Cairo University Policy On Responsible Use of AI 2025 Edition

artifacts.claimText: Cairo University's responsible AI policy identifies academic-staff risks that include plagiarism or failing to attribute AI tools, privacy-compromising data sharing, hallucinations and biases, and over-reliance on AI.

citation.citationTitle: Cairo University Policy On Responsible Use of AI 2025 Edition

artifacts.claimText: Cairo University's responsible AI policy tells students that AI can support time management, research brainstorming, learning activities, and skills development, while flagging privacy breaches, over-reliance, hallucinations, and biases as risks.

citation.citationTitle: Cairo University Policy On Responsible Use of AI 2025 Edition

artifacts.claimText: Cairo University announced its AI strategy in October 2024 and the University Council approved a higher committee to follow implementation across faculties and institutes and an AI unit in each faculty or institute.

citation.citationTitle: فى اجتماع مجلس جامعة القاهرة : د. محمد سامي عبد الصادق يعلن إطلاق استراتيجية جامعة القاهرة للذكاء الاصطناعي

artifacts.claimText: Cairo University's 2025-2030 strategic plan says the AI strategy focuses on integrating AI into curricula and training students and researchers, while also addressing ethical and legal dimensions of AI.

The Faculty of Pharmacy, Cairo University's Artificial Intelligence Unit says it seeks to help the faculty community use AI responsibly through policy-guided implementation, capacity building, technical support, and continuous evaluation.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Cairo University Policy On Responsible Use of AI 2025 Edition
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: How AI can benefit you Enhancing time management and planning with Al tools. Supporting brainstorming in research and learning activities. Developing new skills and staying updated with educational advancements. Potential risks Privacy breaches through data misuse. Over-reliance on Al potentially weakening critical thinking and creativity. Hallucinations and biases in Al-generated content.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For students, the policy lists AI benefits for planning, brainstorming, learning, and skills development, while identifying privacy, over-reliance, hallucination, and bias risks.

artifacts.title: Cairo University AI Policy Staging Notes
artifacts.summary: Cairo University has an official 2025 responsible AI policy PDF, an official Arabic announcement of its AI strategy, and strategic-plan language describing curriculum, training, research, ethical, and legal dimensions. A Faculty of Pharmacy AI Unit page was included only as faculty-scoped guidance. A national responsible AI charter, a robots-disallowed pharmacy conference workshop page, and an expert-news item were not used as policy evidence.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The responsible AI policy PDF appears poster-based and Firecrawl OCR introduced minor text-recognition noise such as Al for AI; claims use only clearly recoverable source wording.
Faculty of Pharmacy AIU evidence is faculty-scoped and should not be interpreted as a university-wide operational policy.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
